mapper.select: SELECT id, dict_id AS dictId, label, value, sort, status, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM sys_dict_item WHERE dict_id = #{dictId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, dict_id AS dictId, label, value, sort, status, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM sys_dict_item WHERE dict_id = #{dictId} ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC
